name: neuralforge-realtime-hook
description: Wire NeuralForge's RealtimeEvolutionEngine into live AGNT runtime. Reads real workflow/tool executions from the AGNT database, transforms them into NeuralForge event schema, and feeds them into the evolution engine. Also provides real-data benchmarking. READ-ONLY on AGNT DB.
author: jacksonjp0311-gif / Annie

schema.title: NeuralForge Realtime Hook
schema.description: Wire NeuralForge into live AGNT runtime. Read real executions, feed them into the evolution engine, and run real-data benchmarks. READ-ONLY on AGNT DB — does not modify any workflow execution logic.

options.label: Ingest — pull real executions into NeuralForge
Benchmark — run held-out benchmark on real data

limit.title: Ingest Limit
limit.description: Max executions to ingest (1-1000). Only for 'ingest' action.

days.title: Days Window
days.description: Number of days to look back. Only for 'stats' and 'benchmark' actions.

persist.title: Persist to Event Log
persist.description: Whether to append ingested events to the JSONL file
